_comment: Lake-map POIs — config file (same pattern as directory.json). EVERY poi has a verified `src` for its coordinate; if a coordinate can't be verified to an authoritative source it is EXCLUDED, not approximated (a wrong pin destroys trust). To add a POI: append an object with id, name, category (must match a categories[].key), lat, lng, blurb, optional link/phone, and a `src`. See ROUND-16-17 build report for the list of POIs excluded pending verified coordinates (trailheads, PRID ramp, Grimes Creek inlet, most businesses, emergency stations, road pull-offs).

pois.name: Vallecito Marina & Yacht Club
pois.blurb: Boat/pontoon/kayak/SUP rentals, slips, fuel, store — the only marina on the lake.
pois.src: Google Maps business listing for 14772 CR 501, Bayfield CO

pois.name: Vallecito Campground (USFS)
pois.blurb: San Juan NF campground near the north end / Vallecito Creek.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Vallecito Campground page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: Graham Creek Campground (USFS)
pois.blurb: San Juan NF campground on the east side of the reservoir.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Graham Creek Campground page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: Pine Point Campground (USFS)
pois.blurb: San Juan NF campground on the east shore.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Pine Point Campground page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: Middle Mountain Campground (USFS)
pois.blurb: San Juan NF campground, east/north shore.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Middle Mountain Campground page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: North Canyon Campground (USFS)
pois.blurb: San Juan NF campground on the east side of the reservoir.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — North Canyon Campground page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: Blue Spruce RV Park & Cabins
pois.blurb: Private RV park + cabins near the lake (a GoVallecito partner).
pois.src: Blue Spruce site Google Maps link (1875 CR 500), per build spec

pois.name: Old Timers Day Use Area (USFS)
pois.blurb: Public day-use / shore access on the east shore, ~1.5 mi north of the dam.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Old Timers Day Use Area page (Lat/Long field)

pois.name: Vallecito Dam
pois.blurb: The dam at the south end of the reservoir (USBR; on the Pine River).

pois.name: PRID public boat ramp
pois.blurb: Public boat ramp & courtesy dock at the marina. Open May 1–Nov 1; PRID permit required ($6/day per vehicle, $12/day boat combo).
pois.src: PRID — states the public ramp & courtesy dock are at Vallecito Marina (co-located with the marina pin)

pois.name: Grimes Creek inlet
pois.blurb: Where Grimes Creek meets the reservoir. Fishing is closed here Sep 1–Nov 14, then snagging is allowed Nov 15–Dec 31 (this stretch only; boundary per CPW Ch. W-1).
pois.src: USGS GNIS — Grimes Creek feature, Vallecito Reservoir quad

pois.name: Vallecito Creek Trailhead
pois.blurb: Start of the Vallecito Creek Trail into the Weminuche Wilderness — at the north-end Vallecito Campground. Lot fills by 9 a.m. on summer weekends.
pois.src: fs.usda.gov San Juan NF — Vallecito Trail page (trail begins at Vallecito Campground; coord = campground)
